advisories.detail: p_P(x) [undefined] in ass:overlap-decay/ass:strict-overlap-endpoint/def:law-class/lem:clipped-region-localization — add a definitionv for the overlap score, e.g. p_P(x)=min{e_P(x),1-e_P(x)} or the intended endpoint-distance, and \ref it from every overlap-decay/localization use

\tau_P(x) [undefined] in ass:margin/ass:zero-effect/ass:overlap-decay/def:welfare-regret/def:law-class/def:two-point-witness/thm:welfare-identity/lem:localized-vc-process-bound/lem:crossfit-localized-process-reduction/lem:clip-bias/lem:localized-clipped-drift-bound — add a definitionv for the treatment contrast \tau_P(x), for example \tau_P(x)=\mu_1(x)-\mu_0(x), and \ref it from all assumptions, definitions, and lemmas using it

\eta [undefined] in def:clipped-propensity/def:clipped-aipw-score — add a definitionv for the nuisance triple \eta=(\mu_0,\mu_1,e) and reference it from the clipped-propensity and clipped-AIPW-score definitions

\widehat\eta^{(-k)} [undefined] in oeq:feasible-upper/def:feasible-erm/def:upper-risk/lem:crude-clipped-score-envelope/lem:localized-clipped-drift-bound — add a definitionv for foldwise cross-fitted nuisance triples \widehat\eta^{(-k)}, including what components they contain and what the superscript means, and \ref it from the feasible ERM and risk statements

policy-compatible [undefined] in ass:vc-localized-envelope/ass:vc-localized-offset-envelope/lem:localized-vc-process-bound/lem:crossfit-localized-process-reduction/lem:crossfit-localized-offset-control — add a definitionv for policy-compatible increment families, stating precisely that dependence on \pi factors through \pi(X), and reference it from the envelope and process assumptions/lemmas

well-formed observed law [undefined] in def:law-class/lem:crossfit-localized-process-reduction/lem:crossfit-localized-offset-control/lem:localized-clipped-drift-bound — add a definitionv for a well-formed observed law on \Omega, including the marginal and conditional-function notation it induces, and \ref it from these statements

P_{n,\sigma} [mismatch] in lem:witness-membership/lem:two-point-divergence/lem:regret-separation — make the witness sign convention consistent: either define P_{n,\sigma} for \sigma\in\{+,-\} with a numeric map, or use \sigma\in\{1,-1\} and P_{n,1},P_{n,-1} everywhere
R_P(\pi) [wrong-ref] in lem:localized-vc-process-bound — replace the reference to Definition~\ref{obj:def:upper-risk} for the regret risk with Definition~\ref{obj:def:welfare-regret}
